description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/xiayesuifeng/arch-go-qt:latest and set a global before_script that exports GOPATH=~/go, adds ~/go/bin to PATH, and enables QT_PKG_CONFIG=true. Define a single stage called build and a job named run-build in that stage. In the run-build job execute the following shell commands in order: mkdir -p $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/polkit-1/actions, mkdir -p $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/dbus-1/system.d, mkdir -p $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/dbus-1/system-services, qtdeploy build desktop, go build -o $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/v2rayxplus-helper helper/cmd/main.go, mv deploy/linux/v2rayxplus $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/, cp helper/config/me.firerain.v2rayxplus.conf $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/dbus-1/system.d, cp helper/config/me.firerain.v2rayxplus.service $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/dbus-1/system-services, cp helper/config/me.firerain.v2rayxplus.policy $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/config/polkit-1/actions. Archive all files under $CI_PROJECT_DIR/build/* as build artifacts.
